fan_voice_summary: Fans are broadly optimistic about Arsenal's title chances this season, with Saka's form drawing particular praise. Some concern remains over squad depth, but the mood at the Emirates is electric.
positive_highlights: ["Saka in world-class form","Arteta's tactical flexibility","Strong home record"]
negative_highlights: ["Injury concerns in midfield","Inconsistency away from home"]

fan_voice_summary: City fans are in high spirits as the team continues to dominate domestically and look threatening in Europe. Guardiola's system is clicking and Haaland is in lethal form. Confidence in the squad is at a season high.
negative_highlights: ["Fixture congestion concerns","Fatigue in the full-back positions"]

fan_voice_summary: Liverpool fans are enjoying a resurgent season under Slot, though the unresolved Salah contract situation remains a source of anxiety. The atmosphere at Anfield has been outstanding and the front line is firing on all cylinders.
positive_highlights: ["Anfield atmosphere at its peak","Front three clicking","Solid defensive shape"]

fan_voice_summary: Chelsea fans are frustrated and disillusioned after another chaotic season. Despite enormous transfer outlay the squad lacks cohesion and the manager appears to have lost the dressing room. Calls for a clear sporting vision are growing louder.
positive_highlights: ["Individual moments of brilliance from young signings","Stamford Bridge still sells out"]
negative_highlights: ["No clear playing identity","Manager under severe pressure","Wasted transfer budget"]

fan_voice_summary: Real Madrid fans are euphoric as the team storms through La Liga and dominates Europe once again. Vinicius and Bellingham are in scintillating form and Ancelotti's calm authority is widely praised. The Bernabeu is rocking.
positive_highlights: ["Vinicius in Ballon d'Or form","Bellingham's leadership","Champions League pedigree showing"]
negative_highlights: ["Defensive injuries a worry","Reliance on two players"]

fan_voice_summary: Barcelona fans are split — there is genuine excitement around Yamal and the academy graduates, but deep unease about the club's financial fragility and its effect on transfers. Results have been inconsistent but flashes of the old Barca are visible.
positive_highlights: ["Yamal emerging as a generational talent","La Masia producing again","Flick's attacking intent"]
negative_highlights: ["Financial constraints limiting ambitions","Defensive vulnerability","Inconsistent away results"]

fan_voice_summary: Bayern fans are largely satisfied with a strong domestic campaign and Kane's impressive contribution up front. Kompany has won over the fanbase with an attacking philosophy. The main frustration is European inconsistency.
positive_highlights: ["Kane's Premier League experience translating well","Kompany's attacking setup","Dominant Bundesliga form"]
negative_highlights: ["Inconsistent in Europe","Leadership void since Kimmich's dip in form"]

fan_voice_summary: PSG fans are skeptical after yet another underwhelming Champions League campaign despite massive investment. Domestically they cruise but fans have grown numb to Ligue 1 titles. The post-Mbappe rebuild is progressing slowly and patience is wearing thin.
positive_highlights: ["Dominant in Ligue 1","Some exciting young talent emerging"]
negative_highlights: ["Champions League ceiling still not broken","Lack of identity post-Mbappe","Fan engagement at domestic games low"]
